subject: English
title: Debate Duel
tagline: Choose your argument, support it with evidence and win the debate!

steps.label: Opening
steps.description: State your opinion clearly so everyone knows where you stand.

steps.label: Give a Reason
steps.description: Explain one clear reason why you think this.

steps.label: Evidence
steps.description: Back up your reason with an example or a fact.

steps.label: Listen
steps.description: Listen carefully to the other side's argument.

steps.label: Closing
steps.description: Sum up your argument in one strong closing sentence.
